title: Animal Garden - Owl
description: Adds owls into the game, that can dance and take a rest on your shoulder.
body:
![bg22](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gMz0rZEq/images/8bab3fdd424dd79d2b040ab8ac4aeea40cdc7971.jpeg)

This mod adds Owls into the game! 

By default they spawn in forest biomes. (You can change this and other spawn settings by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders)

You can tame them with meat

and make them party hard with the jukebox.

They can also take a little rest on your shoulders.

Mod Currently Supports

**Forge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.3 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1 | 1.19.2**

**Fabric 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**NeoForge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**

SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects)
